# examplecloud_resource (Data Source)

Queries an example resource.

Some note...

## Example Usage

### Basic

The basic configuration.

```terraform
data "examplecloud_resource" "example" {
  name = "foo"
}
```

### Complete

The complete configuration.

```terraform
data "examplecloud_resource" "example" {
  name    = "foo"
  address = "bar"
  age     = 123
  role    = "Software Engineer"
}
```
